meta.description: Interior and exterior design, space planning, and turnkey fit-out for discerning clients across Ukraine, Moldova, and Europe.

footer.tagline: Interior and exterior design shaped around how you live.
footer.rights: © {year} InnaYa Design Studio. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Let's design a space perfect for you.
hero.subtitle: Interior design, bespoke furniture, and turnkey delivery across Ukraine, Moldova, and Europe.

values.title: Honesty, transparency, and results you can anticipate.
body: We guide residential and commercial clients through a structured path: brief, survey, planning, and a full design package with visuals you can trust.
Whether you are buying new property or refreshing an existing home, we help you see the full potential of the space — without noise or ornament for its own sake.

editorial1.title: From measured drawings to VR walkthroughs.
body: Our design projects include demolition and construction plans, reflected ceiling plans, electrical layouts, and full wall elevations with detailing you can build from.
Rendered stills, working video walkthroughs, and presentation films help you feel the space long before installation begins.

editorial2.title: Author supervision and turnkey fit-out — when you want continuity.
body: We collaborate with trusted partners for turnkey delivery, and we can stay on site with author supervision billed hourly so intent is preserved in every joint and finish.
Product design covers built-in and freestanding furniture — conceived to fit your architecture, not the catalogue.

process.title: From first contact to handover
steps: Design project (plans, elevations, details, visualisations, walkthroughs)

about.title: About the studio
about.lead: InnaYa Design Studio is an independent practice for interior and exterior design, space planning, and bespoke furniture. We create calm, functional spaces through a clear process from first idea to final delivery.
about.experience: With over seventeen years of experience, we pair creative direction with clear, buildable documentation.
about.education: Higher professional education (specialist degree with distinction), plus advanced training in Revit, Enscape, and Rhinoceros.
about.regionsBody: We work in Ukraine, Moldova, across Europe, and internationally by arrangement. We collaborate primarily with Ukrainian- and Russian-speaking clients outside excluded jurisdictions.
about.regionsNote: We do not take on new projects for clients based in the Russian Federation or Belarus.
about.storyBody: A fuller personal story from the principal designer will appear here — for now, know that our process is built on listening first, documenting carefully, and delivering predictable, delightful outcomes.

services.title: Services
services.intro: Comprehensive design for homes, apartments, and commercial spaces — from first survey to VR presentation and optional turnkey delivery.
services.measurementBody: We use a Leica distance meter to quickly capture accurate dimensions, wall geometry, and key site conditions before design begins. It helps us reduce guesswork, build reliable plans faster, and make early design decisions with more confidence.
services.measurementImageAlt: Leica distance meter used for room and surface dimensions
services.pricingLead: Indicative design fees from €25 per square metre for survey, planning, and design packages; product design and supervision are quoted individually.
services.consultationBody: We offer online consultations and a complimentary initial conversation covering your goals, scope, and a preliminary estimate of our fees. There is no obligation to commission work afterward.
consultationPrepareItems: Property location, approximate size (m²), and whether the project is new build, renovation, or fit-out only
Any available floor plans, surveys, or photos — sketches and phone pictures are fine
Your target timeline and a realistic budget range for design (and fit-out, if known)
Rooms and functions you need, plus fixed constraints such as lease rules, listed status, or structural limits
Reference images or short notes on mood, materials, and what to avoid (optional but helpful)
Who will attend the call and make decisions on your side
consultationExpectItems: A focused 45–60 minute video call (or in person when we are in the same region)
A structured conversation about how you will use the space, priorities, and non-negotiables
An overview of our process, typical deliverables, and project phases
A preliminary fee indication based on scope and square metres — refined after survey and brief
Straightforward guidance on whether our services match your scale, timing, and location
Clear next steps if you choose to proceed, with no pressure to commit during the call
services.spacePlanningIntro: Clients receive a complete planning track including:
spacePlanningItems: Plans and elevations of all walls in every room
Working video walkthroughs of the designed interior
Option for turnkey fit-out through partners
services.interiorBody: Residential and commercial environments of every scale — new construction, renovation, and adaptive reuse — composed in any aesthetic direction you choose, without pompous classic pastiche.
services.productBody: Built-in and freestanding furniture designed to integrate with architecture, lighting, and daily rituals.
extrasItems: VR project presentation for immersive reviews
Author supervision on an hourly basis
Turnkey fit-out and procurement via vetted partners
pricingItems: Per square metre — surveys, space planning, and design projects
Individual pricing — bespoke furniture and product design
Per square metre — fit-out and procurement where applicable

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Placeholder case studies — replace imagery and narratives when project photography is ready.

lakeside-retreat.title: Lakeside retreat
lakeside-retreat.excerpt: Warm minimal envelope with tactile plaster and oak joinery.
body: A calm residential concept balancing daylight, neutral warmth, and precisely framed views. Built-in storage disappears into wall planes while freestanding pieces anchor each zone.
Deliverables included full spatial planning, millwork documentation, and rendered studies for key rooms — ready for your own photography to replace these temporary visuals.

urban-atelier.title: Urban atelier
urban-atelier.excerpt: Compact commercial interior with layered lighting and acoustic calm.
body: Designed for focused work and small client meetings, the atelier uses soft contrast, textile walls, and discreet services integration.
The palette stays quiet so art and product samples become the focal points — ideal for creative practices that host guests by appointment.

soft-hotel-suite.title: Soft hotel suite
soft-hotel-suite.excerpt: Guest room study with tactile upholstery and sculptural lighting.
body: A hospitality study exploring how softness, sound, and scent can be choreographed without clutter. Lighting scenes shift from day to evening with minimal controls.
Furniture layouts prioritise circulation for housekeeping while keeping the guest experience residential in tone.

residential-loft.title: Residential loft
residential-loft.excerpt: Open plan with defined micro-zones and custom kitchen architecture.
body: The loft uses a single material spine — stained oak — to tie kitchen, library, and entry. Blackened steel moments add crispness without coldness.
Ceiling services were reorganised to allow cleaner volumes; lighting tracks are integrated into joinery reveals for a gallery-like ceiling plane.

sholomitska-residence.title: Sholomitska residence
sholomitska-residence.excerpt: Warm contemporary apartment with calm textures and bespoke joinery.
body: A high-comfort city residence designed around soft natural finishes, integrated storage, and flexible social zones for daily life.
The project package included full planning, finish schedules, and visualisations to guide implementation with confidence.

riverbank-flat.title: Riverbank flat
riverbank-flat.excerpt: Coastal urban interior with muted tones and crafted details.
body: This concept balances light, privacy, and spatial flow in a compact footprint, using layered lighting and built-in elements.
Documentation covered planning, custom furniture, and room-by-room visual studies for streamlined execution.
